enabled.description: Enable opt-in database health collection for configured services.

postgres_enabled.description: If true, DUMB configures this Lidarr instance to use DUMB PostgreSQL. SQLite remains the default.

postgres_main_db.description: Optional override for the Lidarr PostgreSQL main database name.

postgres_log_db.description: Optional override for the Lidarr PostgreSQL log database name.

postgres_enabled.description: If true, DUMB configures this Prowlarr instance to use DUMB PostgreSQL. SQLite remains the default.

postgres_main_db.description: Optional override for the Prowlarr PostgreSQL main database name.

postgres_log_db.description: Optional override for the Prowlarr PostgreSQL log database name.

use_profilarr.description: If true, DUMB will auto-link this Arr instance to Profilarr when Profilarr core_service matches.

postgres_enabled.description: If true, DUMB configures this Radarr instance to use DUMB PostgreSQL. SQLite remains the default.

postgres_main_db.description: Optional override for the Radarr PostgreSQL main database name.

postgres_log_db.description: Optional override for the Radarr PostgreSQL log database name.

use_profilarr.description: If true, DUMB will auto-link this Arr instance to Profilarr when Profilarr core_service matches.

postgres_enabled.description: If true, DUMB configures this Sonarr instance to use DUMB PostgreSQL. SQLite remains the default.

postgres_main_db.description: Optional override for the Sonarr PostgreSQL main database name.
